block_00: Use this tool to find the best entries
block_03: The Average Directional Index (ADX) indicator is an advanced technical analysis tool that can help you achieve several goals. By adding it to your strategy, you can:
block_04: Measure the strength of the trend;
block_05: Learn about the direction of the trend (up or down);
block_06: Spot the best moment to enter or exit a trade.
block_07: Learn how to set up this indicator and use its signals to get great results in this material.
block_11: Use the ADX + Parabolic SAR combo to confirm the trend and catch upcoming reversals. Read the article to learn this strategy.

block_17: Check your strategy to make sure you aren’t making common mistakes.

block_20: Learn about 3 methods to spot breakouts and use them to boost your strategy.
